name: Mend Salve
description: A graft-cultured poultice. Knits a wounded limb back together mid-fight.

name: Vigor Draught
description: Bitter, electric. Floods the core with a burst of Vigor.

name: Calm Tonic
description: Steadies a war-body on the edge of berserk — vents Strain fast.

name: Ward Gel
description: Hardens over the core for a moment, soaking the next hits.

name: Field Repair Kit
description: Clamps, solder, spare tissue. Fixes one damaged graft on the road.

name: Incendiary Rounds
description: A magazine that sets what it hits alight — extra bite, lingering burn.

name: Piercing Rounds
description: Dense slugs that punch clean through plating for heavy damage.
